title: No Titles GUI
description: Delete titles from inventory and more.
body:
# No Titles GUI
This **vanilla** resource pack for offers a clean and minimalistic experience by removing the titles from various GUI elements, such as "Inventory," "Chest," "Furnace," and more. 

With this pack installed, you’ll enjoy a less cluttered interface, allowing you to focus more on the game without unnecessary labels. Perfect for players who appreciate a sleek and streamlined HUD, this pack enhances your gameplay by reducing visual distractions while maintaining the game's original look and feel.

![No Titles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a81bb804be98306d40a3c05ba0d9e6d6e5251002.png)
